stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Which of the following combinations is correctly describing the colous used in the aerodrome sign in the figure?

options.a: A4 would be white writing and 27R CATI/II/III would be yellow writing
options.b: A4 would have a red background and 27R CATI/II/III would have a yellow background
options.c: A4 would be yellow writing and 27R CATI/II/III would be white writing
